allow: Bash(echo "=== OS ===" && cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo "=== Brave running? ==="; pgrep -a -f brave 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "=== Any debug port? ==="; ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "9222|9223|9229" || echo "no common debug ports open")
Bash(cat /tmp/xtest.log 2>/dev/null; echo "=== alive? ==="; ps -p 152955 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "still running" || echo "finished")
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix scraper: paced small-window search + rate-limit backoff + resume *)
